overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring an NCPD character walking through a dystopian urban environment. The character navigates under elevated highways, crosses intersections with futuristic vehicles, and ascends ramps toward industrial structures in a detailed cyberpunk cityscape with overcast dusk lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing by individuals sitting against the wall

notable_agents.action: homeless individuals sitting against the graffiti-covered wall with belongings

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure spanning overhead with visible support columns
tall concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
modern industrial building with horizontal windows and metallic facade
tall palm trees visible in the distance along the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure. A graffiti-covered wall runs along the right side where homeless individuals sit against the concrete. Industrial buildings line the left side of the street, and the overcast sky is mostly obscured by the overhead infrastructure.

events.description: character steps onto the crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
large military-style truck drives past from left to right through the intersection
purple sedan speeds past on the street while character waits on the median

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, pausing to let vehicles pass before continuing to the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: large dark green armored truck driving through the intersection
woman in red dress walking along the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: traffic signal suspended over the intersection showing red light
marked pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt street
multi-story commercial structure with illuminated signage and large windows

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into an open intersection. They step onto the crosswalk and wait as a large military truck and a purple sedan pass through. A traffic light hangs overhead showing red, while a pedestrian in red walks along the far sidewalk. The environment opens up with more sky visible and commercial buildings lining the streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial boulevard with palm trees and digital signage

events.description: approaching prominent building with large illuminated '12' signage and vertical 'AW930' text

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial boulevard lined with palm trees, passing digital billboards and storefronts

entered.detail: tall commercial building featuring large red illuminated '12' and vertical 'AW930' signage on the facade
illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics on the sidewalk
row of tall palm trees lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wider commercial street lined with palm trees and digital billboards. The camera passes various storefronts and approaches a distinctive building with a large illuminated '12' sign. The environment features mixed lighting from the overcast sky and neon signs, with scattered pedestrians visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway access ramp with industrial infrastructure

events.description: character turns toward and begins ascending the concrete ramp leading to the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking up the inclined ramp toward the elevated highway structure, passing under industrial piping

entered.detail: steep concrete ramp with yellow safety markings leading up to the elevated roadway
massive spherical industrial storage tanks visible at the top of the ramp
covered industrial walkway with fluorescent lighting spanning across the ramp
safety railings with horizontal bars lining the edge of the ramp

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and begins ascending a concrete ramp leading up to the elevated highway. Large spherical industrial tanks dominate the view ahead, while the ramp passes under a covered industrial walkway with overhead lighting. The environment becomes more industrial and enclosed, with metal railings lining the ramp and the graffiti-covered walls of the lower level falling away behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic urban underpass into an open commercial district before ascending back into an industrial zone. It begins with the character walking along a narrow sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, passing graffiti-covered walls and homeless individuals in the shadow of the overhead infrastructure. As the character emerges from under the overpass, the environment opens into a wide intersection where they wait at a crosswalk while military vehicles and sedans pass under an overcast sky. The scene then shifts toward a commercial street lined with palm trees and digital billboards, moving past various storefronts toward a building marked by a large illuminated sign. Finally, the camera follows the character as they ascend a concrete ramp, leaving the city streets behind to approach large spherical industrial tanks and a covered walkway.
